name: chatgpt-search
description: | Search ChatGPT and extract the full response + hydration JSON that powers the UI. Attaches to a running Chrome instance (port 9222 by default), opens ChatGPT, submits a query, waits for the streamed response, and returns structured data: messages, product cards, hydration JSON, and API calls. Use when asked to "search chatgpt", "ask chatgpt", "chatgpt search", "get chatgpt response", or "scrape chatgpt".
author: SeifBenayed
summary_zh: 这是一个能自动向ChatGPT提问并抓取完整回复的工具，帮你直接拿到结构化的对话内容及底层接口数据，适合需要批量抓取或程序化解析ChatGPT结果的场景。
